ranking_basis: Top 10 economies by nominal GDP, using IMF World Economic Outlook (October 2025) country projections.
weight_method: Heuristic country exposure score combining economy size, market contagion relevance, energy and shipping sensitivity, and regional linkage. This is a model-based exposure estimate, not an audited loss series.
notes: GDP baseline updated to 2025 nominal GDP. World total aligned to IMF DataMapper. Country rows in this package were normalized from the IMF-sourced 2025 country ranking table used for implementation.
